parsed_review.summary: CP00-948 (RP30.P06.M03.S02-RP30.P06.M03.S11, risk A, 10 units, EvaluationRestriction HRX slice tail) is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack consistent with the established 50+ pack pattern. Verified through read-only inspection: (1) Pack baseline matches HRX_CP948_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:950), HRX_CP948_REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS (registry.js:3697), and HRX_CP948_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:3712) — risk A, 10 units, range RP30.P06.M03.S02-S11, micro_title 'EvaluationRestriction HRX slice' x10. (2) createHrxCp948EvaluationRestrictionTailDescriptor (registry.js:11269) and the domain-row builder (registry.js:4025-4032) close every EvaluationRestriction flag (runtime_opened, record_write_opened, real_data_allowed, bypass_allowed, policy_runtime_opened, decision_emitted, score_runtime_opened) to false; only descriptor_only/deferred decisions are true. Zero dangerous-flag-true occurrences in the generated contract. (3) validateHrxCp948EvaluationRestrictionTailDescriptor (validators.js:8939) enforces those boundaries plus the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true, runtime_opening at CP00-949), Hermes emits_runtime_receipt false / deterministic_only true, and Claude packet read_only true / promotes_claude_to_final_approval false. (4) Tests (model.test.js:2506-2592) assert coverage/descriptor/contract validation errors are empty. (5) The contract reflects HrxCp948EvaluationRestrictionTailDescriptor as latest_projection. (6) scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs is read-only (readFile only) and chains CP947->948->949 bindings. (7) No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold (command-evidence no_real_data true, writes_product_state false; descriptor product_state_written false). (8) CP178+ hardening checks pass: readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1447-byte valid-JSON stdout) — not an auth failure, 0-byte, or malformed case. (9) Honest readiness: runtime_ready false, production_ready currently false pending this review, enterprise trust closed — no over-claiming. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so the expected human/enterprise approval boundary does not block this CP closeout goal. The descriptor-level production_ready flag 'hrx_evaluation_restriction_tail_descriptor_verified' is fully supported. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
